word: H6848 - צֶפַע - tsephaʻ - tseh'-fah or tsiphoniy tsif-o-nee' - Adder

sections.paragraph:
Original: צפעני צפע

Transliteration: tsepha‛ tsiph‛ônı̂y

Phonetic: tseh'-fah or tsiph`oniy tsif-o-nee'

BDB Definition:

  1. poisonous serpent
    1. a viper snake or adder

Origin: from an unused root meaning to extrude

TWOT entry: 1954a,1954b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
